name: SEAdLINNNG
overview: SEAdLINNNG is a Japanese women's professional wrestling promotion founded in 2015 by former Stardom wrestler and co-founder Nanae Takahashi. Their roster is predominantly made up of outside talent from other promotions such as Ice Ribbon, Gatoh Move Pro Wrestling and World Woman Pro-Wrestling Diana, as well as veterans, freelancers and their own dojo trainees.
